title: 11 gummy skydiver reunion
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Image 1 supplies the bright cloud altitude and floating Peelerz-island finale, but simplify its clutter. Image 2 supplies a distant parachuting Tina only. Image 3 supplies distant Ani-Mango-Raul scale only, rebuilt as translucent candy armor. In the foreground, dozens of tiny colorful gummy characters skydive together through the clouds, holding hands in several clean circular formation rings. Tina's parachute and transformed Raul remain small but recognizable in the distance. Bright joyful aerial wide shot. No rainbow emphasis, aircraft, falling panic, duplicate heroes, or generic candyland ground.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage or storyboard grid. Follow each prompt's stated reference roles. Preserve Raul as the same dark-haired teenage boy and Meg as the same blonde teenage girl in the source images, but always relocate their encounter from the park bench to crowded high-school football bleachers. Raul's flavor is mango-orange. Meg's working flavor is acid-green apple. Mango minions are energetic translucent gummy hype-men; Meg has exactly one sardonic green gummy imp. Preserve live-action teenage identities while using anime energy or tactile candy characters where requested. Mouth-passage imagery must remain wholly confectionary and never anatomical. Avoid generic robot armor, weapons, preschool mascots, horror, captions, borders, watermarks, and added package copy.
